Document:
# Station Management SOP
This section of Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) is to help guide Members of Station Management as to what to do during normal station activities. These personnel are considered part of the crew and are employees from NanoTrasen Headquarters (NT-HQ) or the Concord Frontier Authority (CFA), henceforth referred to as Station Management (SM), as opposed to the average crewmember. These crewmembers have no official commanding power on the station, outside of what is explicitly stated in their SOP, with the definition of who is who listed below.
# Upper Management Members of Upper Management consist of: - NanoTrasen Representative (NT-HQ) - Magistrate (CFA)
# Lower Management Members of Lower Management consist of: - Affairs Official (NT-HQ / CFA)
# Protective Services While not Management, they are tasked while protecting Management and as such fall under this catagory. Members of Protective Services consist of: - Blueshield Officer (NT-HQ)
# Allignment Employees of NT-HQ are interested in furthering the interests of the Company by enforcing Standard Operating Procedures, but not necessarily following Spacelaw - Getting away with as much as they can manage under the constant gaze of the Concord Frontier Authority.
This does not mean you have a free-pass to blatantly violate spacelaw if you feel like it, and you are still obligated to follow it, this is just to explain the mentality between the two sides.
Employees of the CFA are interested in protecting the rights of all sapient beings equally, holding Spacelaw above all else. They are not particularly interested in assisting the company follow Standard Operating Procedures - So long as they do not violate Spacelaw.
